@author:
@user1 last comment...here is where I think that check needs to go. We are getting the `str` of the object but when passed in as a DTA the introspection is different than when passed in an object array. Wondering if we have shared utilities to already handle that ambiguity I could leverage instead of trying to do it all in this extension
